metadata.title: Chimère Ω v0.1 — blueprint paper for a physico-cognitively-inspired local-first LLM runtime
metadata.description: Blueprint / position paper (v0.1, 2026-04-22) proposing an architecture for a local-first physico-cognitively-inspired LLM runtime. Cites verified 2025–2026 SOTA on hybrid Mamba-2 / attention architectures (Qwen3-Next, Nemotron-H, Granite-4), neural complexity bounds, and persistent-homology-based concept routing. Three design hypotheses are put forward as falsifiable targets: (H1) compositional MoE router conditioned by PH_k of hidden states improves long-range reasoning beyond pure top-k gating; (H2) Engram-based long-term memory with modular-covariance retrieval yields cheaper context-window emulation at matched quality; (H3) local-first privacy constraint is compatible with ≥ 90% the quality of cloud-scale dense models under 8 GB VRAM. This is NOT a theorem paper — no cosmological or physical claim is made. Ancillary files include reproducible micro-benchmarks and build notes.
